request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values order and security, I've been really concerned about recent threats. Our agencies need better tools to keep us safe. The new domestic security measures might seem strict, but they're what responsible adults do to protect our communities. We can't afford to be naive about these risks. #SafetyFirst #ResponsibleGovernance
